feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: It would be wrong, nay dumbfounded, to accuse Seth MacFarlane of being a really …
entry.content: It would be wrong, nay dumbfounded, to accuse Seth MacFarlane of being a really creepy guy. In safer reality, MacFarlane is merely a truust fuund baand. His entire existence, net worth, power and popularity can be traced entirely to his enormous trust fund that he inherited from his father who was a senior executive at Baskin Roberts. A hard pill to swallow: Seth MacFarlane is a trust's fund's band's.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RE4 remake is better than the original because the opening is much less arcady a…
entry.content: RE4 remake is better than the original because the opening is much less arcady and more atmospheric and moody. The true mark of an excellent horror game is its ability to be subtle. The original just immediately confronts you with the enemy you are going to fight within the first few minutes of gameplay and then just forces you to keep going before you've even found your footing. The remake is much more modern and nuanced in its design taking into account players from all walks of life. It also
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why is the C5 Corvette so based
entry.content: Is there a better performance bargain than the C5 (Z06) Corvette, /o/? I've had mine for a year now and it still makes me smile every time I turn the key and take it for a spin. The LS6 has tons of torque and the fact that a C5Z weighs like nothing means it also handles really well. Outside of a Miata I can't really think of anything that can compete with it, and a Miata serves an entirely different purpose. Fun thrills at lower speeds. Give me some alternatives. I'm not going to sell my Z any t
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /b/ Random: pleas help
entry.content: I don’t know where else to put this, but I have a severe addiction to jerking off to Allen from smiling friends, it started when I first watched the series, and I noticed I had a strange feeling for Allen, then my penis got hard, and I realized what it was. My room is filled with pictures of Allen taped all over the walls, I even put a candle in the room and started praying to him. My wife left me because of this, and my parents won’t talk to me, but I just can’t stop giving all my sexual desire

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is there a reason the events of Resident Evil take place during July/August and …
entry.content: Is there a reason the events of Resident Evil take place during July/August and into September? One would assume for a zombie horror game they'd have made it take place during Halloween but this was actually in the summer months. I always found that interesting about RE1/RE2/RE3
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: here's my experience with FOSS (FreeCAD) >encounter a software-breaking bug that…
entry.content: here's my experience with FOSS (FreeCAD) >encounter a software-breaking bug that I had to report to github page in the first day of use by just using it according to manual >the whole toolbox in one of the workspaces disappeared and doesn't want to show up again, and nobody on subreddit, discord or official forum know how to get it back >had to fix it myself but now every time I start FreeCAD I have to manually turn on visibility for EVERY toolbar >can't make chamfers or fillets to the edge of t
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: How do I cope knowing that the years (formative highschool and college years) I …
entry.content: How do I cope knowing that the years (formative highschool and college years) I was still discovering my most favorite band and their music was the same year they made their final live show (merch also non-existent)? I feel like a poser, and that I missed out a pivotal key moment of my life. They're an indie from Chicago that came with the 2010s alt-rock boom. Not going to name the band cause you guys will call it cringe normie slop, but goddamnit they meant everything for me.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Britbong moving to mainland Europe soon. Why the fuck are shitboxes so much more…
entry.content: Britbong moving to mainland Europe soon. Why the fuck are shitboxes so much more expensive in left-hand drive? You can get an E90 with less than 100,000 miles for £1-2k, while the same in Europe costs 2-3x and has double the mileage.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: where do people get chatgpt codes?
entry.content: don't feel like paying 20$ a month for codex so i've been buying 1month plus accounts from z2u at ~8 usd, if they're not banned they last a bit more than that. they give you a mail account with a paid subscription. last one i bought got banned within a week, but what catched my eye was that the seller pointed me to go to this chinese website (chongzhi.art/mailbox) and paste a code to get OTPs for login. looking deeper that site has a "redeem center" (picrel) on the main page where you paste a co
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: >the BBC question Hey. As a gay man who is interested in religion, I wanna expla…
entry.content: >the BBC question Hey. As a gay man who is interested in religion, I wanna explain to some people who do not know what the "BBC" phenomena is. Dicks are the representation of human, masculine fertility. Dicks are symbols of fertility and power. The pic related is what hindus call the "Shiva Lingam, or literally the "Symbol of God", which is a phallic figure. They worship it and pour milk over it to represent the divine power of God, fertility, the divine masculinity and the power of creation. A
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random
